name: Drew Carey
blurb: A 1991 appearance on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson earned him an invitation to Carsons couch, a rare honor.
bio: Drew Carey is an American comedian, actor, and game show host who rose from the stand-up circuit to star in his own ABC sitcom The Drew Carey Show and to host the American version of the improv show Whose Line Is It Anyway?. A 1991 appearance on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson earned him an invitation to Carsons couch, a rare honor. Since 2007 he has hosted The Price Is Right on CBS.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at the Cleveland Comedy Club
Network TV debut on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
The Drew Carey Show premieres on ABC
Begins hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway? (US)
Becomes host of The Price Is Right

accolades: Invited to Johnny Carsons couch on his first Tonight Show appearance (1991)
Star of The Drew Carey Show
Host of The Price Is Right since 2007
